title: Remove Vignette
description: Remove Vignette is a simple yet effective texture pack that enhances your Minecraft gameplay by removing the dark vignette effect around the screen.
body:
**Remove Vignette** is a simple yet effective texture pack that enhances your Minecraft gameplay by removing the dark vignette effect around the screen. Whether you're exploring caves or roaming the open world, this pack clears up your view, giving you a cleaner and more immersive experience. Additionally, it softens the vignette of the pumpkin overlay, keeping the border effect while leaving your screen unobstructed. Perfect for players who want a clearer perspective without the visual distractions!

- Removes the dark vignette effect around the screen, improving visibility during gameplay.
- Enhances immersion by providing a cleaner and clearer view, especially in dark areas like caves.
- Softens the pumpkin overlay vignette, leaving only the border effect while keeping the screen unobstructed.
- Ideal for players seeking better visibility without visual distractions.
